info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing e-commerce platform build time operations including product listings, orders, and customer management.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, retrieval, updating, and deletion of product information.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order processing, and order history.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Customer account management including registration, profile updates, and authentication.

tags.name: analytics
tags.description: Provides insights and reporting capabilities for sales, customer behavior, and system health.

post.description: Registers a new user in the system with the provided user details. Accepts user information in the request body and returns the newly created user profile on success.

example.message: Invalid or missing user registration data provided.
A user with this email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Allows a user, identified by userId, to place an order. Processes order details and returns the confirmed order response.

example.message: The order request data is invalid or malformed.
The user specified by userId was not found.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches detailed information for the specified order identified by orderId.

example.message: The provided orderId parameter is invalid.
No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a new item to the shopping cart for the specified user identified by userId. Accepts cart item details in the request body.

example.message: Provided cart item details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a user
get.description: Retrieves the current shopping cart contents for the specified user identified by userId.

example.message: The provided userId parameter is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipment status for a specific order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping status and tracking details for the order identified by the provided orderId. This operation returns real-time tracking information to the client.

example.message: The requested order does not exist or cannot be found.

details.issue: No order matches the given orderId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry in the system with the provided product information. The request body must include all necessary product details. A successful response returns the created product data.

requestBody.description: Product data to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality over-ear wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

example.message: The provided product data is invalid or missing required fields.
A product with the same name or identifier already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receive and process webhook events related to payment status updates. The request body contains event details sent by the payment provider. The endpoint validates and persists the payment notification.

requestBody.description: Webhook notification payload from payment provider

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
The payment could not be completed or was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a new payment transaction using the provided payment details. The request body must include payment amount, method, and relevant order information. A successful response returns payment status and related data.

example.message: The payment request contains invalid or missing parameters.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment provider.

details.issue: Card declined due to insufficient funds

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment processor

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code used for the order amounts

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role assigned to the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated

rating.description: Average user rating for the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with long battery life

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units in the cart for this product

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after discount applied

currency.description: Currency code for the price values

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking info was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time for the order

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier partner

totalAmount.description: Total sum of product prices before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount value applied on the cart

currency.description: Currency code used for all price values in the cart

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of individual products added to the cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Payment method chosen by the user

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing the payment

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment was made

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

transactionId.description: Identifier for the payment gateway transaction

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

currency.description: Currency in which the product price is listed

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

message.description: Detailed error message for the client

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: The API endpoint path where the error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the client request

details.description: List of specific issues related to the error

field.description: Name of the field with an issue

issue.description: Description of the problem with the field

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed error message for the server error

status.description: HTTP status code indicating server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the server error occurred in ISO 8601 format

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request correlated with the error
